reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención tanto en playa como en servicompras. Se pueden encontrar productos regionales gastronómicos y artesanales, felicito por esa iniciativa que hace del lugar un sitio diferente.
Se cumplen los protocolos.
Será el lugar óptimo cuando Jáchal disponga de gas natural y puedan ofrecer GNC.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both on the beach and at the convenience store. You can find regional food products and handicrafts; I congratulate them on this initiative that makes the place unique.
They are following all the protocols. It will be the perfect place when Jáchal has natural gas and they can offer CNG.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLdXR5Wk5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Para mejorar, deberian incluir el precio del vaso de soda al cafe  y no cobrar aparte la soda, hay gente que pueds no entenderlo y se queja!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
To improve, they should include the price of the glass of soda with the coffee and not charge separately for the soda. There are people who may not understand it and complain!
